# coolify_team (Data Source)

Use this data source to retrieve information about a Coolify team and its members.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "coolify_team" "default" {
  id = 0
}

output "team_name" {
  value = data.coolify_team.default.name
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (Number) The numeric ID of the team.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) The description of the team.
- `members` (Attributes List) The members of the team. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--members))
- `name` (String) The name of the team.

<a id="nestedatt--members"></a>
### Nested Schema for `members`

Read-Only:

- `email` (String) The email address of the team member.
- `id` (Number) The numeric ID of the team member.
- `name` (String) The name of the team member.
